cases.prompt: GA4 연동해줘. 이벤트 추적이랑 퍼널 분석도 같이.

assertions.text: Sets up a GA4 (or PostHog/Mixpanel) analytics stack with installation steps.
Produces an event taxonomy document for tracking user behavior.

cases.prompt: Add PostHog and Clarity to track user behavior, with a GDPR consent banner.

assertions.text: Integrates PostHog plus a session tool (Clarity/Hotjar).
Adds consent management addressing GDPR / 개인정보보호법.
